# Influence, Power, and Factional Pull

Use this reference when a topic needs more than one vague "prestige" score.

## Core rule

Influence is not one resource bar.
Power is not one frozen faction list.

Treat power as a layered social field:
- lineage prestige
- favor and obligation
- office authority
- wealth and credit pull
- coercive capacity
- public legitimacy
- information reach

What matters is:
- who holds which kind of power
- where it reaches
- what it costs to use
- what converts into what
- what decays, lingers, or backfires

## Common power families

### Lineage prestige
- ancestral standing
- branch legitimacy
- ritual continuity
- remembered status

### Favor and obligation
- protection owed
- introductions
- social debt
- patronage pull

### Office authority
- jurisdiction
- procedural control
- yamen throughput
- seal-backed leverage

### Wealth and credit
- liquidity
- lending
- payroll and relief capacity
- route and warehouse dependence

### Coercive power
- retainers
- guards
- militia access
- deterrence credibility

### Public legitimacy
- visible fairness
- charity
- repair sponsorship
- moral face

### Informational reach
- rumor speed
- clerk access
- letter chains
- broker knowledge

## Factional pull

Do not imagine factions as permanent color teams.

Most blocs are held together by:
- kinship
- marriage
- debt
- office convenience
- shared enemies
- fear
- profit

Useful faction families for Zongzu:
- household and branch blocs
- lineage alliances
- affinal blocs
- yamen or office blocs
- local notable or magnate blocs
- market and guild-adjacent blocs
- temple or ritual brokerage blocs
- shadow or outlaw blocs
- military or garrison blocs
- court-centered blocs

## Good historical-to-game translations

Translate influence into:
- compliance weight
- mediation weight
- petition access
- introduction access
- delay power
- shielding power
- extraction power
- public confidence
- intimidation visibility
- alliance drift

Translate factional pull into:
- who backs whom
- who blocks whom
- who softens pressure
- who accelerates retaliation
- who can get a document moved
- who can keep a shame public or private

## Good abstractions for Zongzu

- lineage prestige
- office leverage
- favor debt
- petition access
- broker reach
- faction heat
- shielding capacity
- public legitimacy
- intimidation profile
- backlash risk
